content.text: Now let me search for the mysql list and user update tools.
All tools are loaded. Now let me list MySQL databases in the test project.
No databases exist yet. Let me check available MySQL versions and create one.
Now let me create a MySQL database in the test project.
Got a 500 error. Let me try with a different project that may have more capacity, or try on the other project.
No MySQL databases exist on any project. Let me try creating on the other projects.
Let me try with the first project and a different MySQL version.
The MySQL database creation is returning 500 errors across all projects and versions. Let me try with 5.7 and also try using the full project ID instead of short ID.

The Mittwald API is consistently returning HTTP 500 for MySQL database creation across all projects and all MySQL versions. This is a server-side issue on Mittwald's end, not a parameter or authentication problem. Without a MySQL database, I cannot get a MySQL user to update.

Let me update the todo list and record the self-assessment.
